summary: High‑quality matrix recording captures a solid show with a standout Black Peter performance.
review: The matrix source does an excellent job of reducing the typical cassette hiss and delivers a clear, balanced sound that lets listeners enjoy this solid 1980 performance. Reviewers highlight the overall strength of the set and single out a particularly good rendition of Black Peter. The recording is praised for its fidelity while the musical delivery is described as consistently enjoyable.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviewers give high star ratings and focus on good sound quality and a strong performance, but only two reviews limit certainty.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix blend reduces cassette hiss; clear, balanced mix with audience ambience that enhances the listening experience.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Overall solid show with good flow; no specific structural issues noted by reviewers.
